title: solanum kitivuense subsp. englerianum
intro: Solanum kitivuense subsp. englerianum, also known as the Engler's nightshade, is a subspecies of the Solanum kitivuense plant, which belongs to the Solanaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of this plant include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, making it a valuable herb for herbal remedies. Solanum kitivuense subsp. englerianum is typically prepared through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
